chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 197 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 16-03-2022 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the Petitioner; whereas, vakalatnama has been filed Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate, on behalf of Respondents No.4 to 7. It appears that in similar facts, we have already decided number of Petitions including C. P. No. D-50 of 2020 vide order dated 22-02-2022, whereby directions have been given to the Respondents to decide the request of the Petitioner. Accordingly, in view of above, this Petition is disposed of with direction to Respondents No.4 and 5 to decide the request of the Petitioner preferably within a period of thirty days from today in accordance with the prevailing law and circular of the Finance Department. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
